name: Alligator Cacciatora Banquet
recipeIngredient: 20 lbs Assorted green and red bell peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Discard the head, feet, and tail of the alligators.
2. Wash and cut each alligator into individual portions. (Note: Three adult alligators typically weigh around 150-200 pounds each.)
3. Use a large pot for cooking. Heat vegetable oil in the pot over medium heat.
4. Add garlic to the hot oil and sauté until fragrant.
5. Add alligator portions, turning them often to ensure even cooking.
6. Add tomatoes and bring the mixture to a boil.
7. Simmer, then add salt, black pepper, crushed red pepper, oregano, bay leaves, and parsley.
8. Cover and simmer for 2½ hours.
9. During the last 30 minutes of cooking, add sliced onions and bell peppers.
10. In the final 5 minutes, add sliced olives.
11. Serve with salad topped by your favorite Italian dressing and crisp bread.
